properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: REMOVE deprecated TLS/SSL; require TLS 1.2+ (1.3 preferred)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: CRITICAL — unsigned JWT; never accept alg:none

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: BROKEN — Castryck-Decru 2022 classical poly-time key recovery; do NOT use; migrate to ML-KEM-1024

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: BROKEN multivariate scheme; do NOT use; migrate to ML-DSA-87 / SLH-DSA

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: REMOVE — badly broken hash; use SHA-512 / SHA3-512

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: legacy auth/wireless built on MD4/DES/RC4 — broken; REMOVE

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: PBKDF1 — deprecated/weak KDF; use PBKDF2/scrypt/Argon2 with SHA-256+

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: GOST 28147/Magma (64-bit) / Kuznyechik / Streebog — non-NIST legacy; migrate to AES-256 / SHA-512 + PQC

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: Skipjack — 80-bit NSA-era cipher, below modern security; REMOVE; use AES-256-GCM

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: IDEA — 64-bit-block legacy cipher (Sweet32 class); REMOVE; use AES-256-GCM

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: migrate to ML-DSA-87 (keep ECDSA only as a HYBRID leg)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: EC curve is Shor-broken; move to ML-KEM/ML-DSA (hybrid)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: SSH key Shor-broken; add sntrup761x25519 KEX + plan PQ

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: RSA key by OID — migrate KEM->ML-KEM-1024, sig->ML-DSA-87 (hybrid)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: standard ASN.1 algorithm name (fused token) — RSA/EC is Shor-broken; migrate to ML-KEM/ML-DSA

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: ECDSA-with-SHA2 by OID — migrate to ML-DSA-87 (keep ECDSA only as a hybrid leg)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: P-256 by OID — Shor-broken EC curve

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: RSA key/cert in an encoded blob (DER OID) — migrate KEM->ML-KEM-1024, sig->ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: migrate to ML-KEM-1024 (+ X25519 in HYBRID)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: GOST R 34.10 (EC/DLP sig, Shor-broken) / 34.11 (Streebog) — non-NIST; migrate to ML-DSA-87 / SHA-512

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: JS crypto lib (RSA/ECC by default) — plan ML-KEM/ML-DSA

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: short/legacy EC curve — Shor-broken + classically weak; move to ML-KEM/ML-DSA

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: sha256WithRSA cert/sig by OID — RSA is Shor-broken; plan ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: SM2 — GM/T elliptic-curve, Shor-broken; migrate to ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: sha1WithRSAEncryption by OID — RSA Shor-broken + SHA-1 collision-broken; plan ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: use AES-256 (Grover halves the key strength)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: use SHA-512 / SHA3-512 for >=256-bit quantum security

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: SHA-224 ~112-bit collision strength (sub-128); use SHA-512 / SHA3-512

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: symmetric/hash JS lib — verify AES-256/SHA-512; no PQ

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: SEED — 128-bit Korean legacy block cipher; prefer AES-256-GCM

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: OK only inside a HYBRID with ML-KEM-768/1024

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: OK only inside a HYBRID with ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: managed crypto — verify the provider PQ roadmap + key-type support

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: OK as the classical leg; pair with PQ KEX (sntrup761x25519)

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: JWT/JOSE lib — RS*/ES* algs are quantum-broken; verify the alg + plan ML-DSA

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: EdDSA by OID — OK only as the classical leg of a HYBRID with ML-DSA-87

properties.name: trelyan:recommendation
properties.value: OK — stateful hash-based sig (NIST SP 800-208); NEVER reuse one-time key state
